title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Infosys - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Thane office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
